title: elymus flexilis
intro: Elymus flexilis, also known as slender wheat grass or green needle grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus flexilis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Elymus flexilis can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
